title: Witherite
description: Mod for Fabric that adds Wither-related items to the game.
body:
### What is Witherite?

Witerite is a new, stronger and better material than Netherite. Items made from this material have greater strength, power and efficiency.

### What items does this mod add?
* Witherite
* Witherite Ingot
* Witherite Pickaxe
* Witherite Axe
* Witherite Shovel
* Witherite Hoe
* Witherite Sword
* Witherite Shears
* Witherite Flint and Steel
* Withering enchantment for weapon
* Withering Defense enchantment for armor

### What will be added to the mod in the future?
* Blocks from Witherite
* Witherite Armor
* Witherite Bow
* Witherite Fishind Rod
* And other things that you can offer as well.

All crafting recipes can be viewed in the REI mod. Keep in mind that the mod is still in development, so various errors may occur. If you find a bug or want to suggest something to add to the mod, you can write about it in our issue tracker on GitHub.
